title: Using Web Proxies
html:
Using Web Proxies

| **Shortcut** | **Description** | | --- | --- | | \[`CTRL+R`\] | Send to repeater | | \[`CTRL+SHIFT+R`\] | Go to repeater | | \[`CTRL+I`\] | Send to intruder | | \[`CTRL+SHIFT+I`\] | Go to intruder | | \[`CTRL+U`\] | URL encode | | \[`CTRL+SHIFT+U`\] | URL decode |

ZAP Shortcuts

CommandDescription
 
**Shortcut**
**Description**
\[`CTRL+B`\]
Toggle intercept on/off
\[`CTRL+R`\]
Go to replacer
\[`CTRL+E`\]
Go to encode/decode/hash

Firefox Shortcuts

CommandDescription
 
**Shortcut**
**Description**
\[`CTRL+SHIFT+R`\]
Force Refresh Page
